reason: Bug fix, not a redesign: dragging selected text from a website onto a folder created a link tile instead of saving the text, because the browser attaches the page URL to a text selection and the add-link branch ran before the save-text branch. The UI change is purely control-flow in OverlayWindow.Dnd.cs — a new LinkTargetService.HasSelectedText guard that routes real selected text to the existing save-text path first, plus extracting that path into a SaveDroppedText helper. No wheel geometry, colours, animations, layout or new screen were touched. The rest of the diff is LinkTargetService and tests. Nothing visual for a mockup set to compare against.
